name: Espresso Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy 2-quart saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate, stirring frequently.
2. Remove from heat and stir in sweetened condensed milk and remaining ingredients until well combined.
3. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Grease two large cookie sheets.
5. Drop mixture by tablespoonfuls onto the cookie sheets, about 1 inch apart.
6. Bake for 12 minutes.
7. Remove cookies from the pan using a pancake turner and place on wire racks to cool.
8. Store in a tightly covered container; use within 2 days.
